---
title: "Dr. Alexandra Fisher"
subtitle: "Lecturer"
description: "University of Edinburgh: School of Philosophy, Psychology and Language Sciences"
image: avatar.jpg
group: alumni
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)


:::

## About

Former MaRSS Lab doctoral student. 


## Contact

- {{< fa brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=OKATbwwAAAAJ&hl=en)
- {{< fa globe >}} [Personal Website](https://www.alexnfisher.com/)
- {{< fa globe >}} [University of Edinburgh](https://edwebprofiles.ed.ac.uk/profile/alexandra-n-fisher)
